lastSuggestion.text:
Update the configuration to use

 a config flow for the city instead of hardcoding it.

steeringHistory.actualUserPrompt: I installed npm:pi-context, @ifi/oh-pi-themes, @aliou/pi-guardrails globally please add them to your configuration.
I installed npm packahes with pin install but they are installed globally, please find them an add them to your pi settings file
